mapper.select: SELECT balance FROM user WHERE public_key = #{publicKey}
select id from xuebiChain.user where user.nick_name = #{nick_name} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE user SET balance = #{balance} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT public_key FROM user WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id FROM user WHERE public_key = #{publicKey}

SELECT id, phone, password, nick_name AS nickName, icon, public_key AS publicKey, balance, student_id AS studentId, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime, role FROM user WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE user SET balance = balance + #{points}, last_sign_date = CURDATE() WHERE id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT last_sign_date FROM user WHERE id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE user SET balance = balance + #{amount} WHERE id = #{userId}
UPDATE user SET nick_name = #{nickName} WHERE id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE user SET password = #{password} WHERE id = #{userId}
